MODULE: cosmos.core.fcp
FILE: cosmos/core/fcp.py (176 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Cognitive Projection (FCP) Engine.

"Good news, everyone! I've invented a device that projects my internal state directly into markdown!"

UPDATES:
- Resilience integration (Circuit Breaker)
- "Deep Focus" Debouncing (prevents I/O floods)
- "Lensing" (Summarization of Focus)

CLASSES:
- FCPEngine: The holographic projector engine.
Now with Debouncing and Stress Protection.
  Methods: async def project_hologram(self, project_id: str)
  Methods: async def get_resonant_context(self, query: str) -> str
